title: Add tests for a package
description: Write table-driven Go tests for a named package, matching the project's existing test style.
prompt: Write table-driven tests for the package {{package}}. Read the existing tests in that package first and mirror their style, naming, and helpers. Target meaningful coverage of {{focus}} — assert real behavior, not just absence of error. Run `go test ./{{package}}/` and iterate until green.

parameters.name: package
parameters.description: Workspace-relative package path to test, e.g. internal/recipe

parameters.name: focus
parameters.default: the package's public functions and their error paths
parameters.description: What the tests should focus on
